initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I am Player BLUE with 0 Dollars. Player RED has 100 Dollars. The current proposal is a "null trade" where neither of us gives anything to the other. If I accept, the game ends and I keep my 0 Dollars (which I already have). If I reject, both of us lose all our resources, meaning I go from 0 to -100 (or simply lose everything, which is effectively 0 but with the penalty of total loss). Since I cannot offer anything to RED to make him want to give me money, and rejecting guarantees a total loss for me, the only rational move is to accept the status quo. There is no incentive to reject a proposal that leaves me with my current (zero) resources.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your proposal. A null trade is the only logical outcome given my lack of resources. Let's finalize this.</message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
